raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a causal principle linking mental states to physical outcomes as prescriptive guidance",
  "implicit_claims": ["Mental states exert direct causal influence on bodily health", "Negative or disordered thoughts reliably produce physical illness", "Observable bodily condition serves as evidence of prior thought quality"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Low internal coherence; the claim is absolute yet relies on vague, unfalsifiable terms without specifying mechanisms or exceptions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Robust evidence of specific psychosomatic pathways exists, interventions target modifiable thought patterns without denying other health factors, and application remains non-blaming",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Health outcomes are attributed primarily or solely to thought quality, ignoring genetics, environment, pathogens, or injury, thereby enabling victim-blaming"
}
